data.title: RED: Write failing test for --without-tag flag in sprint-list-epics.sh
data.description: Write a behavioral test in tests/scripts/ that exercises sprint-list-epics.sh --without-tag=brainstorm:complete against a stub ticket set. Test must FAIL before implementation. Assert: given two epics where one has brainstorm:complete tag and one does not, --without-tag=brainstorm:complete returns only the untagged epic. testing_mode: RED
